title: BlackRose's Shenanigans
description: A way that BlackRose wanted Minecraft to be
body:
# "BlackRose's Shenanigans" modpack
> "A Minecraft I wanted." -BlackRose

---

This is a modpack that will change "little" things in Minecraft.

This modpack was all about making Minecraft more enjoyable with the following things in mind: extra additions of items that Minecraft doesn't have, and making the game more immersive.

This modpack features the following mods. Not every mod will be named:

---



## Optimization mods

```
> Sodium (Good old mod)
> Iris Shaders
> Lithium
> ImmediatelyFast

and other
```
---

# Q&A

Q:
Why would I want to download your modpack?

A: 
For me, it's fun, just a simple upgrade to Minecraft

Q: Why is there no modpack logo?

A: I didn't had idea of what logo I wanted to put, and also I'm not a professional artist. So there will be no logo for maybe 2-4 weeks

Q: Does the modpack have harmful mods inside it?

A: It doesn't have any; you wouldn't see the modpack if Modrinth moderators found harmful mods in my modpack

> Q: Will you update to any snapshots?

> > A: No

> > Q: Why?

> > A: The snapshots are a deadly laser </3

> Q: What just happened to the modpack's description?

> A: I'm trying my best to update it, okay?


> Q: When will you update to the version *26.1*?

> A: Beta state will tell you

---

# About the CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 license

This modpack now runs on CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 license, because a mod called [Blooming Biosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/blooming-biosphere) is there. So, a very simple explanation of the license, so that you will not have to research what it does:

**Attribution (BY)**: You must give credit to the original creator, provide a link to the license, and note if you made any changes.

**Non-Commercial (NC)**: You can only use the work for non-profit or personal purposes. You cannot use it to make money or promote a business.

**ShareAlike (SA)**: If you remix, adapt, or build upon the work, you must release your new creation under exactly the same Creative Commons license.

**4.0 International**: This is the latest legal version, written to be globally understood and specifically tailored to work easily on modern digital platforms and websites.

---

About the **Non-Commercial (NC)**, I take this modpack as a hobby, and I do not care about the money
